interior design,cream style,high quality, rendering level, 4k, high definition, , a high-resolution photograph of a cozy, elegantly decorated living room. This image captures a well-appointed room bathed in soft, warm light, emanating from recessed ceiling lights and a grand chandelier. The walls are adorned with a mix of framed artworks, including abstract and nature-inspired pieces, adding a touch of artistic flair. The focal point is a plush white sofa adorned with various pillows in neutral tones, complemented by a large, potted green plant beside it.
